_comment: Config-driven Copy activity source/sink matrix for local run mode. Add new entries here to enable more combinations without changing localRunner.js.

adls_stream.description: Read file from ADLS Gen2/Blob, write to ADLS Gen2/Blob. Streams text content via ADLSRestClient. Supports: DelimitedText, JSON, Binary (raw bytes), XML, Avro (raw copy only).

formatConversions.crossReason: Format conversion (e.g. CSVâ†’Parquet) requires a Spark/Synapse engine. Not supported in local run mode.

not_supported.description: Requires a live connection (SQL, REST, Salesforce, etc.) â€” not supported in local run mode.

unsupportedPairs.sqlâ†’adls: SQL source requires live database. Use a real pipeline run.
unsupportedPairs.adlsâ†’sql: SQL sink requires live database. Use a real pipeline run.
unsupportedPairs.restâ†’adls: REST source requires live HTTP connection.
unsupportedPairs.httpâ†’adls: HTTP source requires live HTTP connection.
unsupportedPairs.adls_gen1â†’adls: ADLS Gen1 is not supported in local run mode.
